creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Release notes:

http://kent.dl.sourceforge.net/project/phpmyadmin/phpMyAdmin/2.11.9.6/phpMyAdmin-2.11.9.6-notes.html

This is a security update to close an XSS and SQL injection
vulnerability.  More details will be in the as yet to be released
PMASA-2009-6 Security Advisory from
http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security/
